settings.question: How do I sign up for MCQ Rewards?
settings.answer: You can join via the Go Rewards app, or simply give your details at the checkout of any MCQ store. It's free to join.

settings.question: Where can I redeem my points?
settings.answer: Points can be redeemed as a discount directly off your bill at any MCQ Supermarket store in Western Australia.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale prices for restaurants and businesses?
settings.answer: Yes — we offer highly competitive wholesale pricing. Please fill in our Wholesale Inquiry form or contact our Malaga branch for details.

settings.question: Is there a minimum order for wholesale?
settings.answer: It depends on the product. Get in touch via the Wholesale Inquiry form and our team will walk you through the current catalogue.

settings.question: Can I order online and get delivery?
settings.answer: Yes — you can now shop online through our Shopify store. In-store shopping remains available at all five WA locations.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept cash, EFTPOS, Visa, Mastercard and popular Australian digital wallets.

settings.question: Is your fruit and veg fresh every day?
settings.answer: Absolutely. MCQ sources fresh produce from Western Australian farms every morning to guarantee the best quality.

settings.question: Do you stock imported Asian products?
settings.answer: Yes — MCQ specialises in Asian and international groceries, with a huge range from Vietnam, Thailand, China, Malaysia and beyond.
